_note: Inputs are well-formed Netvox R718Y fPort-6 data frames (two from the upstream TTN examples, two synthetic) plus error cases. expected.data is the authored normalization, cross-checked against the upstream Apache-2.0 reference decoder as oracle: upstream DiffPressure is already calibrated Pa, Volt is V, Temp is C. pressure.differential is Pa as-is, battery is V, air.temperature is C; the low-battery flag is surfaced as the camelCase extra lowBattery.

uplink.description: Status report: positive differential pressure and temperature
Negative differential pressure and negative temperature (two's complement)
Low-battery flag set (high bit of battery byte) surfaces lowBattery extra
Config-response frame on fPort 7 carries no measurement
